// ConnectionStrings: Empty by default → the host runs DB-less (the simulation/closed-loop path is in-memory). docker-compose injects MapDatabase / TrafficControlDatabase so Map + TrafficControl persist topology + reservation snapshots.

EventBus.// UseInMemory: true = in-process integration bus (dev/tests); false = CAP outbox + RabbitMQ (set in docker-compose).

BackgroundJobs.// schedules: Hangfire recurring jobs (1-minute floor). Wired in the host when a Hangfire server + storage are present.
